blockingIssues.description: Line 955: confidence calculation uses sum of all pattern frequencies instead of per-pattern frequency. Line 1143: convention parsing uses wrong string slice index [3..] instead of [4..]. Line 1175: get_anti_patterns_for_error is an unimplemented stub returning empty vec.
Lines 196, 218, 237, 253, 271: unwrap_or_default() silently swallows JSON serialization errors, risking lost audit trail data. Should propagate error or handle explicitly.

EventType::Observation and ObservationPayload are defined but log_observation() method is missing from EventLog. The expectedBehavior requires 'Stores observations and outcomes immutably' but only log_outcome() exists.

MemoryEntry does not have a confidence field (added in mem-confidence-bayesian but not integrated). SqliteMemoryStore database schema has no deprecation columns. Deprecatable trait is dead code since MemoryEntry doesn't implement it.

get_by_type(), get_by_label(), and get_by_provenance() do NOT filter by repository - return ALL memories across ALL repositories. Violates 'cross-repo memories isolated by default' requirement. Root cause: MemoryStore trait doesn't include repository parameters for these methods.

Feature description requires 'BGE-reranker for cross-encoder reranking' but only SimpleReranker is implemented. RerankerModelType::Bge falls through to SimpleReranker - no ONNX model loading or actual BGE inference exists.
search() does NOT filter by source_episode_id despite it being in MemoryQuery. The handoff claimed 4 provenance tests but they don't exist in codebase.
BM25 search stream (line 620) generates Uuid::new_v4() instead of using actual RecallResult.entry_id. This breaks RRF fusion since IDs don't match actual memory entries.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the error handling convention: 'All fallible operations return Result<T, SwellError>' - several features used Option or io::Error instead, and the event_log module uses io::Error directly rather than SwellError/thiserror.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: mem-event-log-jsonl (io::Error), mem-deprecation (Option return), mem-confidence-bayesian (proper Result usage documented)

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify skills directory convention: '.swell/skills/' per AGENTS.md vs '.skills/' used by some features. The memory-skill-extraction feature uses '.skills' default which conflicts with documented convention.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: memory-skill-extraction stores to '.skills' but AGENTS.md shows '.swell/skills/rust-coding/SKILL.md' structure

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add guidance on magic numbers and tuning parameters. The mem-meta-cognitive feature has hardcoded weights (100_000.0, 60_000.0, 0.3/0.2/0.5) with no documentation on how to manage such values.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: mem-meta-cognitive composite_score() uses hardcoded weights per task type

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify parse/fallback patterns for FromStr conversions - whether they should be fallible (Result) or use silent defaults like SemanticEntityType::parse() does.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: mem-semantic-memory uses silent defaults in parse methods, no guidance in AGENTS.md or Rust skill

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note about #[async_trait] macro usage - new developers might not know to use it without checking existing code.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: mem-contrastive-learning review notes async_trait pattern not mentioned in Rust skill
